questions: how to be more culturally aware?
answers: Cultural awareness is understanding and appreciating the differences in customs, values, beliefs, and practices among people from different cultural backgrounds.
Cultural awareness holo different culture er riti-niti, belief, ar values bujhte para ar shommaan kora.
Cultural awareness is important because it helps prevent misunderstandings, builds stronger relationships, and creates more inclusive environments in workplaces and communities.
To become more culturally aware, travel or read about other cultures, listen without judging, ask respectful questions, and reflect on your own cultural biases.
